title: Assistant Accounting Manager
description:
Job Description:

  • Manage and oversee the accounting activities, prepare the monthly and quarterly financial reports, year-end closing and preparation of year-end audit, GST filing, tax returns and annual filing in accordance with local accounting standards and tax requirements, corporate policies, listing rules, and statutory deadlines.

  • Prepare and review statutory financial statements & GST submission.

  • Manage and prepare annual budgets, forecasts, monitoring expenditure against budgets and basic financial analysis to support business decisions.

  • Work closely with the consolidation team on the quarterly group consolidation.

  • Manage liquidity and cash flow of the Group. Assist in all banking related matters, liaise with bankers and work closely with the Group treasury team in Hong Kong.

  • Liaise with company secretary for all local statutory requirements.

  • Assist with accounting system integration.

  • Any ad-hoc projects and assignments assigned.

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum 6 years of working experience in commercial sector, accounting and audit firm as well as finance experience in manufacturing operations would be an advantage.

  • Degree in Finance, Accounting or other related disciplines.

  • Proficient in speaking and writing in English and chinese.

  • Proficient knowledge in SAP and Sage (Accpac) accounting system for company level.

  • Hands-on experience in financial accounting, tax and treasury management.

  • Working knowledge of all statutory legislation and regulations.

  • Excellent communication, presentation, writing and interpersonal skill.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving capability with a keen eye for details.

  • Responsible, self-motivated and able to work independently.

  • A team player and able to meet tight deadlines.

  • Proficient in MS Excel, Word and PowerPoint.

    Job title and salary shall commensurate with qualifications and experience.

    If you keen to explore this career opportunity with us, please upload your detailed resume stating current and expected salary and contact details. 

    For more information about the Company, please visit our website: https://gp.industries

    We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
GP Industries Limited is an international manufacturing and marketing group with operations in the fields of Battery Solutions and Acoustics & Electronics, as well as Industrial Investments. The Company has been listed on the Mainboard of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited (“SGX-ST”) since 1995. It is the main industrial investment vehicle of Hong Kong-listed Gold Peak Technology Group Limited.


Our extensive manufacturing and distribution network spans over 10 countries across Asia, Europe and the Americas. Excluding associates and joint ventures, the Group currently employs approximately 6,620 people and occupies a total floor area of approximately 631,400 square meters.


Talents and teamwork are core to our growth journey. We develop and cherish the skills of our team, and provide them with an inclusive and collaborative working environment to drive innovation for sustainability, quality, speed to market and effectiveness.


GP Batteries supplies an extensive range of battery products to original equipment manufacturers, leading battery companies as well as consumer retail markets under the GP brand name.


In Acoustics & Electronics, we develop, manufacture and market a wide range of industry-leading products under household brand names including KEF and Celestion.
postedCompany.name: GP INDUSTRIES LIMITED
